generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing real-time occupancy data for post-occupancy analysis and control policy refinement via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring indoor temperature for real-time building operational monitoring and energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing humidity levels to support indoor environmental quality monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Luminosity sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control and visual comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building automation sensor measuring real-time energy consumption across building systems for operational analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensor providing occupancy status for dynamic control policies and energy management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDetectionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance MotionDetectionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched 3D Building Information Model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data including building components, relationships, and control semantics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformer, HonoDittoConfigurator
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized real-time sensor data (occupancy, temperature, humidity, light levels, energy consumption) ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed by Ditto for semantic coherence with BIM."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, MotionDetectionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoStateManager, RealTimeDataProcessor
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control configurations including lighting control policies (TwinLight) and reinforcement learning-based optimization (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Renderer
]

instance DeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Standardized device metadata (tenant ID, device ID, endpoint addresses) extracted from BIM model for middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BimModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BuildingInformationModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data providing geometric, spatial, and functional information."
    DTDFVocab:enables BimToRuntimeTransformer, DeviceMetadata
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity middleware for real-time data ingestion from physical sensors using MQTT-based communication protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform providing state synchronization and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoStateManager, TwinStateSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment enabling interactive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, ScenarioTestingService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates domain semantics extraction and runtime interface generation through model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables BimToRuntimeTransformer, ControlPolicyGenerator
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture framework enabling integration of custom services (analytics, optimization) while maintaining interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance OverallDigitalTwinEntanglementMetric : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Evaluates fidelity and alignment between physical and virtual systems through continuous assessment of system entanglement."
    DTDFVocab:enables FidelityMonitoring, AlignmentValidation
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations (via Unreal Engine 5) for facility managers to observe system states (energy consumption, occupancy)."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateVisualization, OperationalMetricsDashboard
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning integration (BOREALIS) for dynamic optimization of lighting, energy use, and visual comfort based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendations, LightingControlStrategies
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning and bidirectional communication with Building Control Systems (BCS) for real-time adjustments (e.g., lighting control via TwinLight)."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedControlExecution, BidirectionalControlCommands
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Virtual testing of operational changes (refurbishments, energy-efficient policies) before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationResults, PolicyImpactAnalysis
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture enabling integration of third-party services (maintenance scheduling, predictive maintenance) through standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThirdPartyServiceIntegration, PluginExtensionManagement
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building operational states including energy consumption patterns and occupancy distribution."
]

instance OperationalMetricsDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard displaying key performance indicators (KPIs) such as energy usage, environmental quality metrics, and system health."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven suggestions for energy-efficient operations derived from predictive analytics and reinforcement learning models."
]

instance LightingControlStrategies : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting policies optimized for visual comfort and energy efficiency based on real-time occupancy and luminosity data."
]

instance AutomatedControlExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic execution of control commands to building systems (HVAC, lighting) based on real-time sensor feedback and optimization models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BidirectionalControlCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmission of control signals from virtual twin to physical actuators (e.g., LED drivers, HVAC systems) for dynamic operational adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ScenarioSimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Virtual test results evaluating the impact of proposed operational changes (refurbishments, policy modifications) before physical implementation."
]

instance PolicyImpactAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of potential operational changes on energy consumption, comfort levels, and system performance."
]

instance ThirdPartyServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of external services (maintenance scheduling, predictive maintenance) through standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PluginExtensionManagement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Management and configuration of custom plugins and extensions within the Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LedDriverActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator (LED driver) receiving control commands from the Digital Twin for adaptive lighting policies."
]

instance HvacController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system controller adjusting heating/cooling operations based on real-time sensor data and optimization models."
]

instance ShadingDeviceActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Window shading system actuator controlling natural light ingress based on luminosity and occupancy data."
]

// Supporting Components
instance BimToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation engine converting BIM data into runtime artifacts for Digital Twin deployment."
]

instance HonoDittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration tool scanning BIM models to extract device metadata and establish MQTT communication channels."
]

instance DittoStateManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "State synchronization component maintaining bidirectional alignment between physical and virtual system states."
]

instance RealTimeDataProcessor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data normalization and integration service ensuring semantic coherence between sensor data and BIM model."
]

instance UnrealEngine5Renderer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine providing interactive monitoring and simulation capabilities for building operations."
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automation platform generating runtime interfaces and control policies through model transformations."
]

instance ControlPolicyGenerator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Domain-specific policy generator creating optimized control strategies for building systems."
]

instance FidelityMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment system evaluating the alignment between physical and virtual system states."
]

instance AlignmentValidation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Validation framework ensuring semantic and operational coherence between Digital Twin components."
]

// Additional Services for Enablers
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data ingestion from physical sensors using MQTT-based communication protocols."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataIngestion
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides BidirectionalCommunication
]

instance TwinStateSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing state synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinStateSynchronization
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides Visualization
]

instance ScenarioTestingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling virtual testing of operational changes before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioTesting
]

instance PluginExtensionManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing and configuring custom plugins and extensions within the Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:provides PluginExtensionManagement
]

instance RealTimeDataIngestion : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about real-time data ingestion status and quality."
]

instance BidirectionalCommunication : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about bidirectional communication status between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance TwinStateSynchronization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about state synchronization status between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance Visualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about visualization quality and performance."
]

instance ScenarioTesting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about scenario testing results and effectiveness."
]

// Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented Digital Twin framework for AECO operations supporting centralized or decentralized twin compositions."
    base:contains BimModel, RuntimeSensorData, ControlLogicModel, VisualizationModel,
                 DeviceMetadata, BuildingInformationModeling, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto,
                 UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineering, StandardizedExtensionPoints,
                 OverallDigitalTwinEntanglementMetric, RealTimeMonitoringService,
                 PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService, SimulationService,
                 CustomServiceIntegration, LedDriverActuator, HvacController,
                 ShadingDeviceActuator, BimToRuntimeTransformer, HonoDittoConfigurator,
                 DittoStateManager, RealTimeDataProcessor, UnrealEngine5Renderer,
                 ModelDrivenEngineeringTool, ControlPolicyGenerator, FidelityMonitoring,
                 AlignmentValidation, RealTimeDataIngestionService, BidirectionalCommunicationService,
                 TwinStateSynchronizationService, VisualizationService, ScenarioTestingService,
                 PluginExtensionManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT transmits **control signals and commands** back to the physical building via the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling **closed-loop operation**. For example, the DT may adjust lighting levels in response to occupancy data or energy optimization goals (as demonstrated in **TwinLight** and **BOREALIS**). The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to manually override or fine-tune control parameters, which are then relayed to the physical actuators. The framework ensures **low-latency communication** between the virtual twin and physical systems, supporting **real-time adjustments** to building operations (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC control). The **bidirectional communication** is governed by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture, allowing for modular integration of new control services."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring low-latency updates for critical operational data. The framework supports **event-driven data exchange**, where sensor inputs and control signals are processed with minimal delay to maintain coherence between the DT and the physical twin. While the document does not specify sub-second synchronization or batch processing for non-critical data, the emphasis is on **live synchronization** enabled by **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for continuous monitoring and adaptive control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Model**: Central semantic repository for building data.
  - **Middleware Layer (Hono/Ditto)**: Enables **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional synchronization**.
  - **Control Layer**: Implements **domain-specific control logic** (e.g., lighting, HVAC) via **TwinLight** and **BOREALIS**.
  - **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine)**: Provides **immersive interfaces** for facility managers.
  - **Extension Points**: Modular slots for integrating **third-party services** (e.g., predictive maintenance, energy analytics).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across building infrastructures, with the **BIM model acting as the unifying semantic layer**. The architecture is designed for **interoperability** with existing AECO tools and standards."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **all phases of the building life cycle**, from **design and construction to operation and refurbishment**, with specific representations for:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Initial BIM model with static geometric and functional data.
  - **As-constructed**: Updated BIM model incorporating deviations from the design (e.g., as-built documentation).
  - **As-operated**: Dynamic DT with real-time sensor data, control logic, and operational feedback (e.g., energy performance, occupancy patterns).
  The framework supports **continuous synchronization** between these phases, enabling **predictive maintenance**, **retrofit planning**, and **adaptive optimization**. For example, the **BOREALIS project** demonstrates how post-occupancy sensor data can iteratively refine control policies over time, closing the loop between design and operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic Coherence**: The BIM model provides a **unified semantic foundation**, reducing fragmentation and ensuring consistency between physical and virtual representations.
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enable **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing divergence between the physical and virtual systems.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**: The BIM model undergoes **validation** before deployment to ensure accuracy.
  - **ODTE Metric**: Quantifies the **overall entanglement** of the DT, measuring its alignment with the physical counterpart.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework supports **event-driven updates** to address dynamic changes (e.g., sensor failures, occupancy fluctuations).
  - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Continuous monitoring of the DT’s performance against real-world data to detect and correct **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al. [49])."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **IoT connectivity** and **Eclipse Ditto** for **digital twin management**, enabling real-time data exchange via standardized protocols. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, REST, OData) are not explicitly detailed in the document, the framework is designed for **low-latency, high-fidelity communication** between physical assets and the DT. The middleware layers support **bidirectional synchronization**, ensuring seamless integration with Building Control Systems (BCS) and other operational technologies."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed using a **service-oriented architecture** with **modular components** hosted on middleware platforms (e.g., Eclipse Hono and Ditto). The deployment process is automated via **model-driven transformations**, generating runtime artifacts from validated BIM models. While the document does not specify cloud-based deployment or proprietary tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD), the framework supports **scalable and maintainable** DT implementations. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer operates separately but integrates seamlessly with the middleware and BIM-based core, enabling immersive monitoring and control interfaces."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
  1. **Middleware Integration**: **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** serve as the backbone for bidirectional communication, enabling seamless data exchange between the DT and external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, facility management tools).
  2. **Modular Architecture**: Standardized extension points allow for integration with third-party services and analytics tools, supporting interoperability across heterogeneous environments.
  3. **AECO-Specific Standards**: The framework adheres to **BIM** and **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, ensuring compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools.
  While specific standards like **IFC or COBie** are not mentioned, the emphasis is on **semantic interoperability** and **automated data exchange** to facilitate collaboration across disciplines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards** such as **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** and leverages **open-source middleware** (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for connectivity. The framework is grounded in **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, ensuring formalized, reusable, and interoperable artifacts. While specific standards like **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** or **Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie)** are not explicitly mentioned, the system is designed for compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools."
]
